items.description:
Developed by the Hyperion Mining Inc to be used by their various private security and defense forces operating in dangerous environments. Although it is not uncommon to see these in mining colonies under going civil unrest.

Helmet: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/15535377315/

R Shoulder: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/15535397210/
